reviews.comment:
Muy bien lugar para recargar y seguir viaje por el desierto ahí hay que hechar si o si y estirar piernas

(Translated by Google)
A great place to recharge and continue your journey through the desert; you absolutely have to stop there and stretch your legs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROenMtRVhREAE

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar que siempre está lleno de vehículos para la carga de combustible, pero la atención es muy buena al igual que los que atienden el bufete, los baños bien cuidados y muy limpios

(Translated by Google)
It is a place that is always full of vehicles for fueling, but the service is very good as well as those who serve the buffet, the bathrooms are well maintained and very clean
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOOThMVHJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cómo todas las YPF Full que visite, muy buena atención, gente muy amable. Se puede desayunar, almorzar, merendar. Hay platos variados, snacks, galletitas y bebidas frías/ calientes

(Translated by Google)
Like all the YPF Full stations I've visited, the service is excellent and the staff is very friendly. You can have breakfast, lunch, or an afternoon snack. They offer a variety of dishes, snacks, cookies, and hot/cold drinks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOOTdUZU5nEAE
